title: Simply Fabulous
description: A perfect balance of performance and graphics, including various quality-of-life improvements.
body:
This modpack aims for the best minecraft vanilla experience while keeping performance in mind. ### Performance Mods such as Sodium, Indium, Lithium, and many others significantly enhance performance, benefiting both low- and high-end systems. Achieve a guaranteed 60 fps on nearly any device, or enjoy playing with shaders and a render distance of 50 chunks at over 300 fps on modern computers. Additionally, these mods optimize server performance, reduce the boot-up time, cap fps when in the background, and offer various other enhancements.
Performance Mods
  • Sodium
  • Indium
  • Lithium
  • Noxesium
  • Nvidium
  • Starlight
  • Entity Culling
  • ...
### Graphics While retaining the vanilla aesthetics, the use of shaders and minor tweaks to resource packs enhances the game's visual appeal without fundamentally altering its appearance.
Shaders

  • Complementary Reimagined
  • Make Up
  • Solas Shader
Resource Packs

  • Dark GUI
  • Fresh Animations
  • Enhanced Book Entities
  • ...

  • Better Third Person
  • Eating Animation
  • Falling Leaves
  • More Animations
  • 3D Skin Layers
  • ...
### Quality of Life Quality of life mods for more information, better sound, more visibility and easier controls.
Quality of Life
  • Full bright
  • Zoom
  • Passive shield
  • Dark mode
  • Better F3
  • Food and enchantment informations
  • Auto run
  • World map
  • Inventory sorting and helpful features
  • Screenshot viewer
  • ...
### Extras Extra features for improved aesthetics or added enjoyment.
Extras
  • Capes
  • Custom menus
  • Custom armor bar
  • More resource packs and shaders from within the game
  • OG crafting table logo
  • ...
